Notice Of Motion For Order To Apportion And Distribute Funds
Off Calendar Dec-19-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for hearing on the Motion to Apportion and Distribute Settlement Funds.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gail Dekreon. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Adriana Robles, CSR #14212. Telephone: 415-551-0332. Email: arobles@sftc.org.

Geoff Sloniker, Esq. appeared with Wrongful Death Heir Troy Hecker, who was placed under oath and testified.

The Court, having reviewed the moving papers and having considered the evidence, both oral and documentary, and good cause appearing, RULES that the following are entitled to distribution of all net funds from settlements from the underlying survival/wrongful death claims, in the following proportions:

Estate of Donald Hecker - 0%;
Troy Hecker - 28.54%;
Richard Hecker - 5%;
Tracie Tourgee - 16.6%;
Joshua Dewalt - 8.33%;
Kristy Dewalt - 8.33%;
Paula Hernandez - 16.6%; and
Randy Burnett - 16.6%.

Additionally, funds shall be issued by Brayton Purcell LLP in the percentages set forth above, subject first to fees and costs, (if any outstanding) and liens, including but not limited to liens (if any) payable to the U.S. Department of Health and Human Services' Medicare program and the California Department of Health Care Services Medi-Cal Program, and subject to any holds placed on funds awaiting response from such agencies.

Furthermore, all future net funds derived from settlements negotiated after the September 21, 2018 death of Donald Hecker shall be distributed in the percentages set forth above.

Counsel for plaintiff shall prepare the proposed Order to Apportion and Distribute Funds and submit same to the Court for review and signature.
